description: Based on a resource plan and standard consultant day rates, an agent must create a project budget.

nodes.task_description: Load the resource plan (roles and number of days) and the rate card (cost per role per day).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully loads both data sources.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total personnel cost by multiplying the number of days for each role by their day rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the total cost for all personnel.

nodes.task_description: Add a 15% contingency and a fixed amount for travel expenses to arrive at the total project budget.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the final budget including contingency and expenses.
